currentFormatDecision: Existing renderer-backed JSON goldens remain JSON to avoid churn-only baseline rewrites. New or substantially rewritten full-frame goldens above this limit should prefer compact PNG/binary pixel storage with JSON metadata.
lfsPolicy: Current .gitattributes keeps *.json as text. Future compact PNG/binary visual baselines must use the existing Git LFS binary rules.

reviewRequirements.oversizedGolden: Every committed *.golden.json above maxUngovernedGoldenBytes must be listed here with a reason, review strategy, and human-review artifact or summary.
reviewRequirements.formatMigration: A future migration may replace these oversized JSON files with compact baselines, but must preserve executable comparison and actionable diff diagnostics.

oversizedGoldens.reviewStrategy: Keep as a governed legacy JSON golden until compact baseline storage lands; review drift with the visual regression report and heatmap output.
Keep as a governed legacy JSON golden until compact baseline storage lands; review drift with the visual regression report and heatmap output.
